# black

Wraps its argument in the ANSI escape codes for black text.

```rad
black(_item: any) -> str
```

```rad
black("Hello")        // -> "Hello" wrapped in the black escape
black(42)             // -> "42" wrapped in the black escape
```

## See also

`red`, `blue`, `color_rgb`
